synopsis: Star Wars: Jango Fett: Open Seasons is a comic miniseries that delves into the dark past of Jango Fett. Most notably, the series reveals how Fett became a Mandalorian warrior, and how he was recruited by Count Dooku. It is a tie-in to the video game Star Wars: Bounty Hunter, which includes a virtual version of the real comic as unlockable content. The series is composed of 4 issues released between May and September 2002, and compiled in a trade paperback edition in January 2003.
title: Jango Fett: Open Seasons
